title: croton angustifrons
intro: Croton angustifrons, also known as the narrow-leaved croton or Philippine croton, is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Croton angustifrons include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various infections. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Croton angustifrons can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to the potential interactions with other medications.
